task_completion.description: The document CRWA_PM_Schedule_FY2025.odt is created and open in a word processor (LibreOffice Writer).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the LibreOffice Writer window with the filename 'CRWA_PM_Schedule_FY2025.odt' in the title bar.

task_completion.description: The document features a title section with the required Document Number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a title section at the beginning of the document containing the text 'PM-CRWA-FY2025-001'.

task_completion.description: An auto-generated Table of Contents is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Table of Contents block, typically with a gray background indicating auto-generated fields, listing the document's sections.

task_completion.description: Page numbers are included in the document footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom of the document pages (footer area) for visible page numbers.

task_completion.description: Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles are used for organization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for hierarchical formatting in the text (larger, bold text for main sections, slightly smaller for subsections) or check the Table of Contents/Styles pane to confirm Heading 1 and Heading 2 usage.

task_completion.description: A formatted table for the Equipment Inventory is included.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a table containing the equipment assets (e.g., pumps, generators) extracted from the JSON data.

task_completion.description: Formatted tables for maintenance frequency categories are included with specific columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for multiple tables categorized by frequency (Daily, Weekly, Monthly, Quarterly, Annual). The tables must contain columns for 'Task ID', 'Description', and 'Responsible Party'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Writer GUI to create and format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing interaction with the LibreOffice Writer interface, menus, or dialogs (like Table of Contents or Header/Footer dialogs).

integrity.description: The agent opened the source JSON file to read the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, terminal, or browser window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/plant_equipment.json'.

integrity.description: The tables are genuine word processor tables, not just text formatted with spaces.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for table gridlines, table formatting toolbars, or table properties being used in LibreOffice Writer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input JSON contains exactly 12 equipment assets and 13 preventive maintenance tasks (3 daily, 3 weekly, 3 monthly, 2 quarterly, 2 annual). There are no semi-annual tasks in the source data, so an empty table or omitted semi-annual section is acceptable. The document must contain the exact string 'PM-CRWA-FY2025-001'. The maintenance tables must explicitly include columns for Task ID, Description, and Responsible Party.
